content.en:
The Lord of the Boundless has been to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and has been in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain for a long time, and he also has a certain understanding of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

Of course, the strength of the Unbounded Lord was only a Triple Primordial Ancestor, and it was not very powerful, so his understanding of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain was only very one-sided information.

But even so, through the information given by the Lord of the Unbounded, Ye Tian now has a lot of understanding of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

For example, as a high-level primordial domain, the Shangling Origin Domain also has many great forces, the most powerful of which belong to the six top powers, and these six top forces are also known as the Fivefold Holy Gate.

The forces of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain can almost be divided into a Miscellaneous Gate, a Twofold True Gate, a Triple Sect, a Fourfold Heavenly Gate, and a Fivefold Holy Gate.

One of the heavy miscellaneous doors is everywhere, such a force has no status at all, and any one of the first ancestors can apply for the establishment of a heavy miscellaneous gate.

Such a small force can be destroyed at any time, so the true geniuses will not join such a miscellaneous sect at all.

Of course, there are also many double true sects, but the situation is slightly better, and they can rely on some top triple sects or quadruple heavenly gates, and the risk of being destroyed is much lower.

And the situation of the Triple Sect is better, some of the top Triple Sects can even rely on the Fivefold Holy Gate, and their status is still very high, and the geniuses among them even have the hope of entering the Fivefold Holy Gate.

And there are very few fourfold heavenly gates, even if it is the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, there are more than a hundred fourfold heavenly gates, and it is not a fourfold original ancestor to establish a fourfold heavenly gate, and without the permission of the fivefold holy gate, it is not allowed to establish a fourfold heavenly gate.

After all, the Fourfold Heavenly Gate has the hope of being promoted to the Fivefold Holy Gate at any time, and none of the six Fivefold Sacred Gates wants to have one more Fivefold Holy Gate.

Therefore, the Fivefold Holy Gate forces can not care about those one, two, and three forces, but the number of the Fourfold Heavenly Gates must be strictly controlled.

Therefore, any fourfold heavenly gate is a subordinate force of the fivefold holy gate, and even if a demonic genius is born, he must enter the fivefold holy gate.

According to the information given by the Lord of the Unbounded, the Fivefold Holy Gate almost did not recruit Origin Ancestors, but only recruited Genius Origin Ancestors from the Fourfold Holy Gate under his command.

Therefore, if you want to join the Fivefold Holy Gate as a casual cultivator, you can only join those Fourfold Heavenly Gates first.

"It's a pity that the Lord of the Boundless doesn't know much about those Quadruple Heavenly Gates, it seems that he still has to go to the Upper Spirit Origin Domain to inquire before he knows the situation!" Ye Tian muttered.

After all, the original Unbounded Lord had no hope of joining the Quadruple Heavenly Gate at all, so he hadn't specifically learned about this information, and naturally he couldn't tell Ye Tian the specific situation.

......

Through the positioning coordinates given by the Lord of the Unbounded, Ye Tian shuttled directly from the edge of the realm to a certain coordinate location in the primordial Black Sea.

Only after comprehending the extreme space-time pole can you shuttle like this.

Soon, after Ye Tian came to an area of the Primordial Black Sea, it was not far from the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

However, this area cannot be located and shuttled, so you must fly slowly and honestly.

It is said that it was the Fifth Origin Ancestor of the Shangling Origin Domain who personally took action and fixed the time and space of this area, and no Origin Ancestor could directly shuttle to the Primordial Black Sea region corresponding to the Shangling Origin Domain, and had to fly slowly from other distant regions.

Ye Tian continued to shuttle through the Primordial Black Sea with the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, shuttling for a long time, and only then did he arrive at the Primordial Black Sea region where the Upper Spirit Origin Domain was located.

At this time, Ye Tian saw a huge black portal.

In this area, there were more than a hundred such huge portals, and each black portal led to a different area of the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain.

Moreover, if you want to enter the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, you must also go through these portals, and if you want to travel through the Space-Time Pole to enter, you can't do it.

The Fivefold Primordial Ancestors had set up a magic circle in the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, so that the Primordial Ancestors could not escape into it, and established these black portals so that outsiders could only enter through the portals.

In this way, it would not work at all if you wanted to sneak into the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

And through the black portal, you also need to pay a fee, otherwise you will not be given.

Any treasure that contains the Extreme Pole can be used as a toll, and you will need to pay this fee every time you enter, even if you just enter and then come out, and then enter again.

Therefore, just collecting tolls, those fivefold holy gates have to earn countless resources!

Ye Tian took out an ordinary Extreme Extreme Dao treasure and gave it to the original ancestor who guarded the black portal, and the other party gave Ye Tian a token, and there were some original coins stored on the token.

The original coin is the currency of the Shangling Origin Domain, and although the value of the Extreme Extreme Dao treasure given by Ye Tian is not high, it is still slightly higher than the toll, so the excess value is converted into the original coin and stored in this token.

In the future, Ye Tian can use this token to trade, which is equivalent to a bank card on the earth.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian passed through the black portal and entered the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

The Upper Spirit Origin Domain is divided into a total of 3,636 large domains, each of which is divided into millions of small domains, each of which has a large number of one-fold miscellaneous gates and a few one-fold and one or two double-fold true gates.

Now.

Ye Tian's location was located in the True Ape Giant City of the True Ape Great Domain of the Shangling Origin Domain, which had a super high reputation among the nearby Great Domains because it was connected to a black portal.

The True Ape Giant City has several Quadruple Origin Ancestors, and the Triple Origin Ancestor naturally has more, Ye Tian's cultivation is inconspicuous here, so no Origin Ancestor pays attention to him.

The True Ape Giant City is very powerful, so it is very well informed.

Ye Tian stayed here for a long time, slowly inquiring about the news of joining the Fourfold Heavenly Gate and those Fivefold Holy Gates.

Gradually, he learned more about the relationship between these Heavenly Gates and the Holy Gate.

And among the more than 100 Quadruple Heavenly Gates, Ye Tian felt that it was suitable for him, and he didn't care about the identity of an outsider, and those who had the hope of entering the Fivefold Holy Gate should belong to the Quadruple Heavenly Gate - the Empty Heavenly Gate!

The Voidless Heavenly Gate is not the most powerful among the Four Heavenly Gates, but it has a very strong heritage and has existed for countless years, and the Voidless Heavenly Gate is the first subordinate force of the Fivefold Sacred Gate Void Tooth Holy Gate.

The strength of the Void Tooth Holy Gate is extremely strong, how powerful it is, Ye Tian doesn't know, but the Void Tooth Holy Gate is willing to recruit outsiders, and some Holy Gates don't want outsiders.

After all, there are countless geniuses in the Shangling Origin Domain, and there is no shortage of original ancestors, while it is difficult for outsiders to know the details, and they do not have too high loyalty to the Shangling Origin Domain, so many Fivefold Holy Gates do not want it, even the Fourfold Heavenly Gate.

However, the Void Fang Holy Gate is the sixth five-fold Holy Gate to be established, so it lacks the foundation, so even outsiders want it.

Perhaps the Void Tooth Holy Gate may not be as powerful as the other Fivefold Holy Gates, but it is the most suitable Fivefold Holy Gate for Ye Tian.

"Then join the Quadruple Heavenly Gate and the Void Heavenly Gate first!"

Ye Tian decided.
